ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., card game, puzzle game) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the game is played (e.g., PC, console, mobile) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Game rating (e.g., ESRB rating) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the player logged in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Player's gender */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Player's age */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotional_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotional response */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotion experienced by the player (e.g., happy, sad, angry) */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the emotion (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the emotional response was recorded */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context for the emotional response (e.g., specific game event) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the emotional response in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotional_responses_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotional_responses_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of game event (e.g., player action, game outcome) */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the game event (e.g., player action details) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the game event occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location in the game where the event occurred (e.g., level, room) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player action */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of player action (e.g., move, attack) */,
  "action_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the player action (e.g., move details) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the player action occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location in the game where the action occurred (e.g., level, room) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the player action in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_actions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of player game data (e.g., player progress, game state) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the player game data (e.g., player progress data) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the game data was recorded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location in the game where the data was recorded (e.g., level, room) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game data in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game leaderboard */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was achieved */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Achievements associated with the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preference of the player (e.g., game type, difficulty level) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the player preference (e.g., game type value) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the player profile was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the player profile was last updated */,
  "favorite_game" TEXT /* Player's favorite game */,
  "favorite_platform" TEXT /* Player's favorite platform */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Player's preferred language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
